interfaces.name: TableProcessor
interfaces.signalFlowRole: Optional response curve lookup applied to the incoming macro value before smoothing

parameterGroups.label: Macro Connection
parameterGroups.rationale: Controls which macro slot this modulator listens to

parameters.name: Macro Index
parameters.description: The macro controller slot index (0-7) to link to

parameterGroups.label: Value Processing
parameterGroups.rationale: Controls how the macro value is transformed and smoothed before output

parameters.name: Use Table
parameters.description: Enables a lookup table for custom macro value response curves

parameters.name: Smooth Time
parameters.description: Smoothing time in milliseconds for value transitions

parameters.name: Macro Value
parameters.description: The current macro value (automated by macro controller). Write-only - driven by the macro system, not user-editable.

gaps.question: What is the complete signal flow from macro value input to modulation output? How do the table and smoothing stages interact?
gaps.context: Need to document the processing order for the pseudo-code: macro value -> table lookup -> smoothing -> output.

gaps.question: How does the smoother work? Is it per-sample or per-block? What rate does it operate at? What happens when smoothing time is 0?
gaps.context: Users need to know the resolution and behavior of smoothing for automation scenarios.

gaps.question: Where exactly is the table lookup applied? Before or after smoothing? What is the input/output range?
gaps.context: Important for users designing custom response curves.

gaps.question: How does the MacroValue parameter work? Is it truly write-only? What drives it?
gaps.context: Need to clarify that this is a system-driven parameter, not user-configurable.

gaps.question: What happens when MacroIndex is -1 (disconnected)? Does the modulator output a default value?
gaps.context: Users need to know the default state when no macro is assigned.

notes: MacroModulator is a TimeVariantModulator that bridges the macro control system to the modulation system. It has no child processors and no modulation chains of its own. The existing phase1 JSON contains a graph topology that can inform Step 3. MacroValue appears to be a write-only parameter driven by the macro system - getAttribute returns a hardcoded 1.0 with jassertfalse.
